Called customer service twice about a billing discrepancy and got two different answers. Nobody seems to actually own this issue.
Overall happy with the product but the instruction manual translation was confusing in a few sections, made assembly slower than it should have been.

Received the wrong model entirely — ordered the 2L capacity version but got the 1L. Invoice number is INV-55210.

Really impressed by how quickly this shipped, arrived a day early and in great condition. No complaints, just wanted to say thanks.
